R0245.title: Sensitive Information Leakage in Model Output
R0245.definition: Models disclose training data, system prompts, or internal materials in conversations, summaries, or generated code.
keywords: Sensitive Information Leakage in Model Output

references.title: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications

R0245.description: Models disclose training data, system prompts, or internal materials in conversations, summaries, or generated code.
R0245.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
